headline: Nigeria Imposes Crypto Tax Amid New Regulatory Framework

article.title: Nigerian president signs order on approach to crypto regulation, taxes
article.summary: The West African country’s executive order established a virtual asset council and addressed the fragmentation of crypto regulation for oversight and enforcement.

article.title: Bernstein raises Robinhood price target, cites tokenization and prediction markets
article.summary: The brokerage’s blockchain strategy, including tokenized equities and its Arbitrum-based Robinhood Chain, could reduce its reliance on traditional crypto trading, analysts said.

headline: Gilts Slide 2% on UK Fiscal Concerns

article.title: Gilts Rattled by New UK PM’s Comment on Fiscal Flexibility
article.summary: Gilts extended their retreat and the pound slipped after UK Prime Minister Andy Burnham said he will seek “any flexibility” in the government’s fiscal rules, stoking concerns his administration will add to the nation’s already-heavy debt load.

headline: $1 Trillion Cash Hoard Swells Amid Fed Uncertainty

article.title: Money Funds Keep Cash Closer as Fed Leaves Markets Guessing
article.summary: Money‑market funds are shifting toward ultra short-term holdings and away from assets with even modest interest-rate risk as uncertainty grows over the Federal Reserve’s policy path and the near-term outlook for rates.

headline: Bitcoin Plunges 50% Below Peak Amid Onramp Report

article.title: New Onramp Report Makes the Case for Spot Bitcoin Over Paper Claims as Price Sits at Half Its Peak
article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

New Onramp Report Makes the Case for Spot Bitcoin Over Paper Claims as Price Sits at Half Its Peak

article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

headline: Bitmine Halts $86M ETH Buys for Share Buyback

article.title: Tom Lee's Bitmine Taps the Brakes on ETH Buys, Pivots $86M Into Stock Buyback
article.summary: "The reduced pace of buys reflects that Bitmine repurchased 5.5 million common shares," Bitmine Chairman Tom Lee said in a statement.

article.title: Strategy Pads Cash Reserve By $225M With MSTR Sale, Bitcoin Stash Remains Untouched
article.summary: For the second consecutive week, Saylor's company sold MSTR stock instead of BTC to pad its reserves to $3.2 billion.

headline: Benchmark Backs Exodus After 25% Staff Cut

article.title: Benchmark backs Exodus after 25% workforce cut, says stablecoin pivot is being overlooked
article.summary: Late Friday afternoon, Exodus said it expects the restructuring to generate $10 million to $13 million in annualized cost savings.

headline: Hut 8 Shares Surge 10% on $9.8B Lease Deal

article.title: Hut 8 fully commercializes 1 GW Texas AI campus with second $9.8B lease as IREN signs $2.8B in contracts; shares climb double digits
article.summary: Hut 8 and IREN shares climb on fresh AI data center deals worth billions as the bitcoin-to-AI pivot continues to accelerate.

headline: US Gasoline Surges Past $4 Amid Iran Conflict

article.title: US petrol prices climb back above $4 as Iran war intensifies
article.summary: Resurgent costs drive frustration with President Donald Trump ahead of midterm elections

headline: Saudi Stocks Plunge 5% on Houthi Blockade Threat

article.title: Yemen’s Houthi rebels threaten blockade against Saudi Arabia
article.summary: Renewed fighting puts kingdom’s crude exports through Red Sea at risk
